title: Day 11: AI Marketing Machine — Campaigns at Scale

steps.title: Your AI Marketing Department
steps.body:
A full marketing campaign involves: audience research, messaging strategy, email sequences, social content, ad copy, landing pages, and analytics setup.

Traditionally: 2-3 people, 2 weeks, $3,000-8,000.

With AI: You define the strategy, AI generates the materials, you review and deploy. Time: 1 day.

Today you'll build an end-to-end marketing campaign — from audience research to final copy — all powered by AI.

The AI marketing workflow:

1. Audience Definition: 'Define our ideal customer profile for [product]. Include demographics, pain points, buying triggers, and preferred channels.'
2. Message Development: 'Create 3 messaging angles for this audience. Which emotion drives the purchase decision?'
3. Content Generation: 'Write a 5-email nurture sequence, 10 social posts, 3 ad variants, and a landing page — all using the chosen messaging angle.'
4. A/B Test Design: 'Propose 3 A/B tests for the email sequence. What variable should we test in each?'

Each step feeds the next. All from one brief.

steps.question: What is the biggest advantage of AI in marketing campaign creation?
options: AI can generate perfect marketing copy that never needs editing
AI can produce multiple variations and formats from a single brief, enabling rapid testing
AI replaces the need for any human marketing strategy
AI automatically knows which audience to target
feedback: Exactly. The superpower is scale and variation — one brief produces dozens of assets across formats. You test, measure, and optimize.
Not quite. AI needs your strategy and brief. But once you provide those, it can produce more variations and formats faster than a team of humans.

steps.title: Build a Campaign in 10 Prompts
steps.prompt:
Campaign: Launch an AI tools newsletter for freelancers.

Prompt 1: 'Define the ideal subscriber for an AI productivity newsletter for freelancers. Demographics, pain points, content preferences.'

Prompt 2: 'Create 5 newsletter name options and 3 tagline options. Each should convey: AI tools + freelancer productivity + actionable advice.'

Prompt 3: 'Write a welcome email sequence: email 1 (immediate welcome + value), email 2 (day 2 — best AI tools), email 3 (day 5 — case study), email 4 (day 7 — community invite).' 

Prompt 4: 'Create 5 LinkedIn posts promoting the newsletter. Each should have a hook, insight, and CTA to subscribe.'

Prompt 5: 'Write 3 Twitter/X threads — one educational, one controversial, one inspirational — all driving to newsletter signup.'

Prompt 6: 'Design a simple landing page structure: headline, subheadline, benefits, social proof, signup form.'

Prompt 7: 'Create 3 A/B test variations for the welcome email subject line.'

Prompt 8: 'Write a launch announcement post for each platform: LinkedIn, Twitter, Instagram, your website blog.'

steps.title: Design Your Marketing Campaign
steps.instruction:
Choose a product, service, or cause you'd market. Build the campaign brief:

Campaign: [What you're marketing]
Target Audience: [Who needs this?]
Key Message: [What's the one thing they need to hear?]
Channel Plan: [Which 3 platforms will you use?]
Email Sequence: [Outline a 3-email nurture sequence — subject line + goal for each]
Social Content: [What 3 post types will you create?]
Success Metric: [How will you measure success?]
steps.placeholder:
Campaign: AI Business Consulting Package
Target Audience: Small business owners (10-50 employees) who feel overwhelmed by AI but know they need it
Key Message: 'You don't need to understand AI. You need someone who does — and we'll implement it for you.'
Channels: LinkedIn, email, local business groups

Email Sequence:
1. 'Is AI actually useful for your business?' — Education-focused, no pitch
2. '3 businesses that cut costs by 40% with AI' — Case study with results
3. 'Let's audit your business for AI opportunities — free' — CTA to consultation

Social: LinkedIn thought leadership posts, client testimonial graphics, short-form video with quick AI tips

Metric: 10 qualified consultation bookings per month

questions.prompt: Think about marketing you've seen recently that made you pay attention. What's one campaign you could recreate with AI for your own audience?
questions.placeholder: A campaign you admired and how you'd do it with AI...

steps.title: Day 11 Complete!
steps.body:
You've designed a complete AI-powered marketing campaign: audience, messaging, channels, email sequence, and social content.

Tomorrow: Building real apps with AI — even if you've never written a line of code.
